title: Emeritus Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Emeritus Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Emeritus Global Group in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Emeritus Global Group:
Emeritus Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus Global Group!
